inputs.label: Sunrise Time (decimal hours)
inputs.businessContext: Time of sunrise in decimal hours (e.g., 6.5 = 06:30)

inputs.label: Sunset Time (decimal hours)
inputs.businessContext: Time of sunset in decimal hours (e.g., 19.5 = 19:30)

inputs.label: Latitude (degrees)
inputs.businessContext: Latitude of location in decimal degrees

inputs.label: Longitude (degrees)
inputs.businessContext: Longitude of location in decimal degrees

inputs.label: Day of Year (1-365)
inputs.businessContext: Day of the year (1 = Jan 1, 365 = Dec 31)

inputs.label: Timezone Offset from UTC (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Timezone offset in hours (e.g., -4 for EDT)

outputs.primary: Golden hour starts at {goldenHourMorningStart} and ends at {goldenHourMorningEnd} in the morning, and starts at {goldenHourEveningStart} and ends at {goldenHourEveningEnd} in the evening.
